updates.tweet_text:
Yesterday #ES_F was rangebound. The range was 7516-7565 as we setup trend. Per 4pm newsletter I was looking for traps below the range. Around midnight, we trapped, recovered, rallied +20

Plan today: 7516=support. 7530, 7549, 7565 above. 7516 fails, dip 7502, 7485 (watch traps) https://t.co/x7HvmCzRJW
updates.notes: Intraday plan: support at 7516, resistances 7530/7549/7565; if 7516 fails, watch 7502 and 7485 for traps

updates.tweet_text:
Excellent follow through to start today in #ES_F. The range would be 7516-7565 as posted. Ranges Failed Breakdown then rally (Charting 101). I was looking for the trap of 7516, we got it last eve. Today's target slate was 7530 (hit), 7549, 7565. Then, we trend hard.

Sell<7516 https://t.co/PNEUml89bu
updates.notes: Posted intraday range 7516-7565 with targets at 7530, 7549, 7565; sell signal below 7516.

updates.tweet_text:
There's 7565 final target hit. Easy day in #ES_F. It was all given in advance: The 7516-7565 was the range. Ranges trap. We trapped 7516 overnight, got long this morning per newsletter. Targets given free here 8am were 7530, 7549, 7565. Ride runner

7570, 7579 (major), 7598 bonus https://t.co/iuSpr04FiY
updates.notes: New upside targets named: 7570, 7579 (major resistance), 7598 bonus level after 7565 target hit.
